vitals.terrain: Moderate with rolling short steep hills or moderate sustained climbs

course_description.overview: A 100 km road cycling event around the scenic volcanic crater lake Danau Ranau, featuring moderate terrain with rolling short steep hills or moderate sustained climbs amid cool mountain air and stunning panoramas.

key_segments.name: Lake Circuit
key_segments.description: Full loop around Danau Ranau with rolling hills and climbs in a mountainous setting.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Moderate difficulty suited for experienced amateur cyclists, with short steep hills and sustained climbs providing challenging yet accessible terrain in a picturesque highland environment.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Bandar Lampung Airport (BKTO) or Palembang Airport (PLM), then drive or take a bus to Danau Ranau in Ogan Komering Ulu Selatan Regency, South Sumatra.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels and guesthouses available around Danau Ranau; book early due to remote location.
logistics.registration_details: Register via official channels such as giwang.sumselprov.go.id; contact +62 81 700 48 705 for inquiries.
logistics.bike_logistics: Fly with bike or rent locally; ensure road bike compatibility for paved routes.
logistics.local_considerations: Cool mountain weather; prepare for tropical humidity, potential rain in November; government-backed event with local support.

final_verdict.one_liner: Scenic road gran fondo around a volcanic crater lake in Sumatra, blending natural beauty with moderate challenges.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Road cyclists seeking adventure in Indonesia's highlands, with stunning lake views and cool air.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for its unique scenery and value as a regional event with government support.
pro_tips: Book accommodations early in remote area.
Pack layers for variable mountain weather.
Contact organizers for latest registration details.
